professional_summary: Operations and strategy professional with 7 years of experience optimizing business processes, managing cross-functional programs, and scaling operations for high-growth technology companies. Proven expertise in process improvement, vendor management, and data-driven operational decision-making using Six Sigma, Jira, and Tableau.

work_experience.title: Senior Operations Manager
bullets: Led operations management for 3 business units, overseeing $15M budget and team of 25 across supply chain and vendor management
Implemented Six Sigma process improvement initiatives reducing operational costs by $1.8M annually through waste elimination
Designed and managed project management workflows in Jira and Asana adopted by 80-person organization
Built Tableau operational dashboards providing real-time visibility into SLA management, capacity planning, and workforce planning
Negotiated vendor contracts with 12 partners achieving 18% cost reduction while maintaining quality metrics

work_experience.title: Operations Program Manager
bullets: Managed end-to-end program management for $8M supply chain modernization initiative across 4 distribution centers
Applied Lean methodology to warehouse operations, reducing order processing time by 33% and error rate by 52%
Coordinated logistics manager workflows and stakeholder management across operations, finance, and technology teams
Tracked project portfolio using Monday.com and Notion, delivering 94% of milestones on time or ahead of schedule

work_experience.title: Business Operations Analyst
bullets: Conducted data analysis using SQL and Python to identify operational bottlenecks reducing throughput by 25%
Created Tableau reporting suite for executive team tracking quality assurance and operational KPIs
Supported PMP-certified project manager on 3 concurrent technology implementation projects worth $5M total
Managed ServiceNow ticketing workflows and IT operations processes for 500-person organization

projects.name: OpsMetrics Dashboard
projects.description: Open-source Tableau operations analytics starter kit with pre-built KPI dashboards for supply chain and logistics teams
